samples.instruction: rearrange the word baai as brain.
actions: pick up the left-most pink plastic craft stick next to letter B
place the pink plastic stick left next to the up most red curved stick
pick up the left-most pink plastic craft stick next to letter B
place the pink plastic stick under the sign brain left next to the blue stick
pick up the left-top-most pink plastic craft stick
place the pink plastic stick next to letter B vertically
pick up the red curved stick from top of the table
place the red curved stick next to the vertical pink stick to form a letter P
pick up the purple stick from top of the table
place the purple stick next to the pink stick to form and under the red curved stick to form letter R
adjust the purple stick to better align with other sticks
pick up the pink stick from the top center of the table
place the pink stick verticaly right next to the blue stick (letter I) on the right side of the table
pick up the blue stick from the top center of the table
place the blue stick diagonally next to right most pink stick to prepare middle part of letter N
pick up the pink stick from the top of the table
place the pink stick vertically between t
